ListItem.Para: Inoperative reverser is secured in the forward thrust position.
Use On-board Performance Tool (OPT) to apply the appropriate performance penalties.

MaintenanceProcedure.Para: Deactivate and secure the inoperative reverser in the forward thrust position (AMM DDG 78-31-01).

ListItem.Para: Verify the track lock is in the locked position (primary or alternate method).
Gain access to the hydraulic actuators on each thrust reverser half.
Verify one hydraulic actuator on each thrust reverser half is in the locked position.
Gain access to the deactivation pins and retainers.
Install the deactivation pins in the left and right reverser sleeves.

Note.Para: After engine start, the ENG REV LIMITED L or R advisory message will be displayed for the engine with the thrust reverser deactivated.

ListItem.Para: For a wet or contaminated runway, apply the performance adjustments for one thrust reverser inoperative.
